top_feature_requests.request: It's so hard to organize my playlists and the sorting options are limited
The gapless playback feature is perfect for albums
I understand you need to make money, but it's excessive
like bro when I make a playlist I like it how it is I don't need some robot to recommend things for it
if you want audiobooks or free music, I highly recommend a different platform
I already pay for premium but that only allows for 15 hours of audiobooks and now they want me to pay for an add on that's the same price as the monthly fee for only 15 hours more
99 a month audiobook add on it should be unlimited
If I add a song to the queue, it'll play the song but will not change the shuffle, so that song could be played right away again if it was in that order of the 'shuffle'
